comments:
Shape — Foundational geometric primitives for vector graphics.

## Design Philosophy

Shapes are pure data descriptions of geometry. They compose algebraically
via boolean operations and path combinations. This is the vocabulary for
"Illustrator on steroids" — everything from simple rectangles to complex
compound paths with boolean operations.

## Shape Categories

**Primitives**: Rectangle, Circle, Ellipse, Line, Polygon, Polyline
**Curves**: Bezier (cubic/quadratic), Arc, Spline, NURBS
**Complex**: Star, Ring, Spiral, Arrow, Cross, Heart, Gear
**Paths**: Open paths, Closed paths, Compound paths
**Operations**: Union, Subtract, Intersect, Exclude, Divide
**3D Extrusion**: Extrude, Revolve, Sweep, Loft

## Dependencies

- Prelude (Eq, Ord, Show, Bounded)
- Schema.Dimension.Device (Pixel for measurements)
- Schema.Geometry.Radius (corner treatments)

declarations.comments:
Enumeration of all primitive shape types.
Used for type-level discrimination and pattern matching.
declarations.title: ShapePrimitive

declarations.comments:
Path commands following SVG path semantics.
These are the atomic operations for constructing paths.
declarations.title: PathCommand

declarations.comments:
Winding rule for determining inside/outside of paths.
Critical for boolean operations and fill rendering.
declarations.title: WindingRule

declarations.comments:
A 2D point in pixel space.
Represents coordinates for shape vertices and control points.
declarations.title: Point2D

declarations.comments:
A bezier anchor point with position and control handles.
Control handles are relative to the anchor position.
declarations.title: AnchorPoint

declarations.comments: Create an anchor point with explicit handles
declarations.title: anchorPoint

declarations.comments: Create a smooth anchor with colinear handles
declarations.title: smoothAnchor

declarations.comments: Create a corner anchor (sharp, independent handles)
declarations.title: cornerAnchor

declarations.comments: Create a symmetric anchor (handles mirror each other)
declarations.title: symmetricAnchor

declarations.comments:
Anchor point type for Bezier curve vertices.
Determines how control handles behave at this vertex.
declarations.title: AnchorType

declarations.comments: Rectangle shape with position, dimensions, and optional corner radii.
declarations.title: RectangleShape

declarations.comments: Create a square shape (equal width and height)
declarations.title: squareShape

declarations.comments:
Ellipse shape with center and radii.
When radiusX == radiusY, this is a circle.
declarations.title: EllipseShape

declarations.comments: Line segment from start to end point.
declarations.title: LineShape

declarations.comments: Regular polygon with N sides inscribed in a circle.
declarations.title: PolygonShape

declarations.comments: Star shape with configurable points and inner/outer radii.
declarations.title: StarShape

declarations.comments: Ring (donut) shape with inner and outer radii.
declarations.title: RingShape

declarations.comments: Arrow shape with configurable head and tail styles
declarations.title: ArrowShape

declarations.comments: Generic path shape defined by commands
declarations.title: PathShape

declarations.comments: Create a path shape from commands
declarations.title: pathShape

declarations.comments: Create a compound shape from boolean operation
declarations.title: compoundShape

declarations.comments: Extrude operation - extend 2D shape into 3D along Z axis
declarations.title: ExtrudeOp

declarations.comments: Revolve operation - rotate 2D shape around axis to create 3D
declarations.title: RevolveOp

declarations.comments: Sweep operation - extrude shape along a path
declarations.title: SweepOp

declarations.comments: Unified shape type that can hold any shape primitive
declarations.title: Shape

name: Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Shape
